goals.notes: First Y-junction; one terminal outlet, one primary continuation.

rejected_draft.rationale: I am completing junction_1 with the required branch vector [-1, 0, -1]. Previous attempts with 'hard' blend modes and various hub radii failed due to non-adjacent overlaps or disconnected solids. I have switched to 'fillet' mode with a max_hub_radius of 10mm (matching the pipe radius) to keep the junction body within the cylindrical projection of the inlet, avoiding lateral overlaps. The fillet blend and increased outlet lengths (20mm) are used to ensure a topologically valid union of the backward-pointing branch arm with the hub.
